response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics for 'Bibideba' by Tsumiki. The segment begins with an extended English dialogue section between the VTubers, which has been transcribed with tight timestamps. The musical performance starts at 02:22, where on-screen text confirms the song title. The provided reference JSON was missing the second verse and rap section, so I have manually transcribed and translated those portions to ensure a complete and accurate subtitle track for the entire duration of the video.
